holdings.infoBox: ERTH is an equity ETF with a total of 192 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 4.93%, Digital Realty Trust at 4.90%, NVIDIA at 4.64%, BYD Co Ltd Class H at 4.55%, and First Solar at 3.92%.

overview.description: The Invesco MSCI Sustainable Future ETF (ERTH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of global companies focusing on contributing to a more environmentally sustainable economy. ERTH was launched on Oct 24, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: MSCI Global Environment Select Index - Discontinued as of 01-JUL-2024
